description_long: This object is a slender, elongated knife with a pointed, leaf-shaped blade and a straight, flat handle. The blade appears to be single-edged, tapering smoothly to a sharp tip, and lacks any visible serrations or decorative features. The handle is simple and unadorned, matching the blade in color and material, and does not feature any ergonomic shaping or grip texture. The entire object has a uniform, dark metallic appearance, suggesting it is forged from a single piece of metal. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian design. The surface finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture that reduces reflectivity.
description: A dark, leaf-shaped knife with a pointed blade and a straight, unadorned handle, all forged from a single piece of metal. The design is minimalist and utilitarian, with a matte, slightly rough finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full leaf-shaped blade and straight handle, highlighting the object's symmetry and pointed tip.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the object's slenderness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again displaying the leaf-shaped blade and straight handle with no visible features on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the thinness and flatness of the object.
